name: video-generation-skill
description: Design video concepts, scripts, shotlists, transitions, and editing notes for VEO, Gemini, and Nano Banana-based pipelines. Use when turning a marketing idea into concrete video assets.
capabilities: Design video hooks and opening sequences
Create full scripts and scene-by-scene breakdowns
Generate platform-specific guidelines for YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, LinkedIn
Structure video content for short-form (15-60s) and long-form (2-10 min) formats
author: CleanExpo
securitySummary: Pure documentation skill containing only markdown content. No executable code, no network calls, no filesystem operations, no external commands. All 22 static findings are false positives caused by the scanner incorrectly flagging metadata fields (source_url, author names, license identifiers) and documentation text as security patterns.
valueStatement: Marketing teams struggle to translate ideas into video-ready plans. This skill provides structured frameworks for hooks, scripts, shotlists, and platform-specific guidelines across YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and LinkedIn.
userTitle: Design marketing video concepts and scripts
limitations: Does not generate actual video files
Does not integrate with video APIs or rendering tools
Requires manual execution of video creation via external tools
No audio or music recommendations beyond platform sound guidelines

useCases.title: Plan campaign videos
useCases.description: Transform marketing briefs into detailed video plans with scripts and shotlists.

useCases.title: Structure social clips
useCases.description: Create platform-optimized video concepts for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts.

useCases.title: Develop YouTube content
useCases.description: Design long-form videos with hooks, summaries, and CTAs for YouTube channels.

promptTemplates.title: Quick social video
promptTemplates.prompt: Design a 30-second TikTok video about [product/topic]. Include hook, problem, solution, and CTA.

promptTemplates.title: YouTube explainer
promptTemplates.prompt: Plan a 5-minute YouTube video on [topic]. Include hook, intro, 3 main points, summary, and CTA.

promptTemplates.title: Multi-platform campaign
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a video content plan that adapts a single idea into YouTube, TikTok, and LinkedIn formats.

promptTemplates.title: Thumbnail and title
promptTemplates.prompt: Design thumbnail concepts and titles for a [platform] video about [topic] following platform best practices.

bestPractices: Start with a strong hook in the first 3-5 seconds
Match video structure to platform and audience expectations
Always include captions for silent viewing
antiPatterns: Using long-form structures on short-form platforms
Skipping the CTA or leaving it too late

faq.question: Which platforms are supported?
faq.answer: YouTube, TikTok, Instagram Reels, Facebook Reels, LinkedIn, and YouTube Shorts.

faq.question: What video lengths can I plan?
faq.answer: Short-form (15-60 seconds) and long-form (2-10 minutes) with custom structures.

faq.question: Does this skill create videos?
faq.answer: No. It creates detailed plans, scripts, and shotlists for execution in external video tools.

faq.question: Is data stored or shared?
faq.answer: No. This skill only generates text-based plans. Any storage follows your workspace policies.

faq.question: Can I customize the templates?
faq.answer: Yes. The frameworks are adaptable. Modify hooks, scenes, and CTA timing for your needs.

faq.question: How is this different from a video editor?
faq.answer: This skill designs the plan. Video editors execute the edit. Use both for complete workflows.
